effin.bio: Nashville bass innovator who fuses vintage samples with modern dubstep punch. Fresh off his 2025 sophomore album Daydreams and a Lost Lands resume, his sets are pure wobble-heavy energy.

news.t: Effin drops third album single 'Dreams Come True'
Effin continues hot streak with 'Bringing Me Down'

fcukers.bio: NYC dance-rock duo who became post-Brat scene darlings with 2024's Libera-winning Baggy$$ EP, then dropped debut album Ö in March 2026. Live, it's sweaty house-meets-indie chaos built for packed rooms.

news.t: Fcukers on the debut album they weren't sure they'd make

flipturn.bio: Jacksonville indie rockers riding 2025's Burnout Days and its 2026 Reimagined companion. Known for explosive, festival-honed live sets that build from shimmering verses to cathartic full-band eruptions.

news.t: flipturn release Burnout Days (Reimagined)
flipturn extend Burnout Days headline tour

four-tet.bio: Kieran Hebden's beloved electronic project, blending pastoral melody with club weight. His 2026 run hits Bonnaroo amid huge headline shows, with hypnotic light-rig visuals and sets that drift from ambient to rave.

news.t: Four Tet adds 2026 dates incl. Brooklyn Storehouse

freddie-gibbs-the-alchemist.bio: Gangsta Gibbs and hip-hop's most surgical producer, touring behind 2025's Alfredo 2. Expect 90 minutes of pure bars and beats — no backing-track crutches, just one of rap's great duos in lockstep.

news.t: Alfredo 2 review: a succulent sequel
Alfredo: The Tour distills two masterpieces live

ganja-white-night.bio: Belgian duo behind the signature reggae-tinged 'wobble' sound. 2025's Sprouted album and their first tour in five years reignited the SubCarbon faithful; their Mr. Wobble visuals make every set a cartoon fever dream.

news.t: Ganja White Night announce first tour in 5 years
Duo sets release date for new album Sprouted

geese.bio: Brooklyn's most thrilling young rock band. 2025's Getting Killed topped year-end lists with its gorgeous chaos, and frontman Cameron Winter's unhinged-preacher stage presence makes their live show unmissable.

news.t: Getting Killed: most creative indie rock LP of 2025
Getting Killed makes a statement as 2025's best rock

girl-tones.bio: Kentucky-bred sister duo (guitar + drums) signed by Cage The Elephant's Brad Shultz, now building toward a debut album after touring with Cage worldwide. Raw, high-energy garage rock from two classically trained sibs.

news.t: Sister duo Girl Tones release 'Cherry Picker'
Girl Tones share rebellious new single 'Got It'

goldie-boutilier.bio: Canadian singer-songwriter praised by Elton John, performing as her Scarface-inspired alter ego from 2025's Goldie Montana — cinematic, noir-glam pop she calls being 'a gangster in a gown.'

news.t: Goldie Boutilier steps into her prime as Goldie Montana
Goldie talks new single and alter ego at ACL

gorgon-city-sunrise-set.bio: North London house duo Kye Gibbon and Matt Robson-Scott, still riding 2024's club-focused Reverie and a massive 2025 US tour. Their vocal-led anthems ('Ready For Your Love') should hit different at sunrise.

griz.bio: Funk-bass producer and saxophonist back from a two-year hiatus with 2025's GEMiNI EP, Future Funk Volume 1, and his own Seven Stars festival. Expect live sax over filthy drops and pure rainbow-colored joy.

news.t: GRiZ on his hiatus: 'I needed to figure out who I am'
GRiZ drops dazzling album Future Funk Volume 1

hemlocke-springs.bio: Naomi McPherson-approved bedroom-pop oddball Isimeme Udu, touring debut album The Apple Tree Under The Sea around Bonnaroo and Gov Ball. Quirky 80s-tinged synth-pop with an endearingly unfiltered stage presence.

news.t: hemlocke springs announces spring tour

holly-humberstone.bio: British songwriter whose sophomore album Cruel World (April 2026) trades whispery confession for bigger, bolder pop. She hits Bonnaroo mid Cruel World Tour alongside Coachella and Gov Ball stops.

news.t: Holly Humberstone announces album Cruel World
Holly Humberstone announces North American tour

hot-mulligan.bio: Michigan's self-proclaimed '#1 Hot New Band' and post-emo inventors, touring 2025's The Sound A Body Makes When It's Still. Cathartic screams, absurd song titles, and crowds that yell every word back.

news.t: Hot Mulligan announce new album and fall 2025 tour

inzo-sunrise-set.bio: Chicago-born melodic-bass producer behind the Alan Watts-sampling hit 'Overthinker' (50M+ streams). Fresh off his 38-date Mirrorverse Tour and a Red Rocks finale, his cosmic, philosophical bass suits a sunrise slot.

news.t: INZO announces 38-date Mirrorverse Tour for 2026
INZO returns to Red Rocks April 3, 2026

jackie-hollander.bio: Bay Area-raised tech house riser who learned to DJ at summer camp — now Billboard's Up-and-Coming Dance Artist with releases on Nervous and REALM, and a 2026 festival run spanning Bonnaroo, Lolla and Electric Forest.

news.t: Billboard's up-and-coming dance artist of the month
Get To Know: Jackie Hollander

japanese-breakfast.bio: Michelle Zauner's indie-pop project, touring 2025's moodier For Melancholy Brunettes (& Sad Women). Onstage she emerges from a giant pink clamshell — intimate sad-girl catharsis with arena-grade staging.

news.t: For Melancholy Brunettes review: beauty in sadness
Live review: from melancholy to euphoria

jessie-murph.bio: Alabama-born genre-bender whose 2025 album Sex Hysteria (with Gucci Mane and Lil Baby) hit the Billboard top 10. Her smoky country-trap-pop voice and theatrical Hysteria-era staging translate big live.

news.t: Cover story: Sex Hysteria is an open letter

juelz.bio: Vancouver's classically trained trap jokester, an RL Grime Sable Valley standout who surprise-dropped the Adrenochrome: Zero mixtape in 2025. Hard-hitting hybrid trap with hip-hop bounce and zero filler.

news.t: Juelz surprises with mixtape Adrenochrome: Zero

kesha.bio: Pop survivor in full freedom era: 2025's Period was her first album on her own Kesha Records, and her 2026 Freedom Tour celebrates liberation and radical joy. She also curates this year's SuperJam.

news.t: Kesha announces The Freedom Tour
Kesha to lead Bonnaroo's all-star SuperJam

kesha-presents-superjam-the-alchemy-of-p.bio: Bonnaroo's legendary collab set, helmed by Kesha: 'SuperJam Esoterica: The Alchemy of Pop' with Margo Price, Chromeo, Grouplove, Rainbow Kitten Surprise, Blondshell, Wyatt Flores and surprise guests in This Tent.

news.t: Bonnaroo reveals Kesha-hosted SuperJam lineup
Kesha to lead Bonnaroo's all-star SuperJam

lambrini-girls.bio: Brighton noise-punk duo whose 2025 debut Who Let The Dogs Out skewers misogyny, gentrification and nepo babies in 29 furious minutes. Live shows are confrontational, hilarious and famously pit-heavy.

news.t: Kerrang reviews Who Let The Dogs Out
Who Let the Dogs Out: righteous noise done right

aszewo.bio: Santa Barbara electronic-pop trio (say 'La-zay-woah'): producers Matt Ehrlich and Justin De La Fuente with singer Keeva Bouley. Emotional storytelling meets euphoric drops; they sold out three NYC shows in one day.

news.t: Łaszewo on Same Same But Different 2025

lil-jon.bio: The king of crunk and eternal hype machine — 'Get Low,' 'Turn Down for What' and a thousand WHATs. He plays the Farm before joining Pitbull's 35-city I'm Back Tour in summer 2026. Pure party, guaranteed.

news.t: Pitbull announces I'm Back Tour with Lil Jon

little-stranger.bio: Charleston-based alt-hip-hop duo Kevin and John Shields — Gorillaz-meets-Beck melodic rap with a goofy streak. Fresh off festival runs (Gov Ball, Electric Forest) and their Broken Hearted Boys Tour.

news.t: A decade of evolution with Little Stranger

lszee.bio: The bass world's favorite team-up: LSDREAM and CloZee fusing cosmic wubs with world-bass textures. Their self-titled debut LP and 2025 doubleheader tour (plus Red Rocks runs) made this project an instant festival legend.

news.t: LSZEE tour captured beautiful snapshots in time
LSZEE headline tour features 15 doubleheaders

lumasi.bio: Fast-rising experimental bass producer who went viral remixing songs for his girlfriend on TikTok. Capped a breakout 2025 with the psychedelic Sun & Moon EP and support runs for Zeds Dead and Mersiv.

news.t: Bass breeds hypnotism on Lumasi's Sun & Moon EP
Your next bass addiction starts with 'The Cube'

major-lazer.bio: Diplo's dancehall-EDM juggernaut, now a foursome with new member America Foster, back with 2025 mixtape GYALGEBRA and fresh off the Milano Cortina Olympics closing ceremony. First Bonnaroo in nearly a decade.

news.t: Major Lazer add first female member America Foster
Major Lazer returns with mixtape GYALGEBRA

mariah-the-scientist.bio: Atlanta R&B star whose 2025 album Hearts Sold Separately hit No. 1 on Billboard's R&B chart behind 'Burning Blue.' She arrives mid world tour with her dreamy, slow-burning love songs and effortless cool.

news.t: Mariah announces Hearts Sold Separately Tour
Hearts Sold Separately debuts at No. 1 R&B
